result.stderr:
Lombiq.Hosting.MediaTheme.Deployer 8.0.1-alpha.9.osoe-925+780b3584d9af993bbaefb7e97c8614cfd665635a
Copyright © 2022, Lombiq Technologies Ltd.

  -p, --path                                Required. Path of your theme
                                            project.

  -i, --base-id                             ID of the base theme, if any. If
                                            left empty, will attempt to get the
                                            value from the theme's Manifest.

  -c, --clear                               Whether or not to clear the Media
                                            Theme media folder of all files
                                            before deployment.

  -d, --deployment-path                     The path where you want the
                                            deployment package to be written to.

  -f, --deployment-file-name                The file name of the deployment
                                            package zip and the value for the
                                            recipe name property.

  -u, --remote-deployment-url               The URL to use for Remote
                                            Deployment, as indicated on the
                                            Orchard Core admin.

  -n, --remote-deployment-client-name       The "Client Name" part of the Remote
                                            Deployment client's credentials.

  -k, --remote-deployment-client-api-key    The "Client API Key" part of the
                                            Remote Deployment client's
                                            credentials.

  --help                                    Display this help screen.

  --version                                 Display version information.

options.description: ID of the base theme, if any. If left empty, will attempt to get the value from the theme's Manifest.
Whether or not to clear the Media Theme media folder of all files before deployment.
The file name of the deployment package zip and the value for the recipe name property.
The path where you want the deployment package to be written to.
The "Client API Key" part of the Remote Deployment client's credentials.
The "Client Name" part of the Remote Deployment client's credentials.
The URL to use for Remote Deployment, as indicated on the Orchard Core admin.
